name: TPC Sawgrass (Stadium)
address: 110 Championship Way, Ponte Vedra Beach, FL 32082
green_fee_notes: 2026 rack rates run $550 (June to August) and $750 in peak season, with dynamic pricing approaching $1,000 in the weeks after THE PLAYERS; the fee includes cart, group forecaddie, and range balls.
notable: Home of THE PLAYERS Championship since 1982
Island-green par-3 17th, one of the most famous holes in golf (141 yards from THE PLAYERS tees)
Pete Dye design that pioneered the stadium-golf spectator concept
The land was famously sold to the PGA TOUR for $1
walkable_note: Walking permitted only with a walking caddie; riding groups get a forecaddie and the course is cart-path only.

confidence.tees: All ratings/slopes verified identical between the official TPC scorecard PDF and USGA NCRDB (CourseID 10804). Blended and ladies' tee sets omitted from the directory card for space; see sources.
confidence.green_fee_notes: 2026 rack rates via Golf News Net (March 2026); TPC uses dynamic pricing so daily rates vary.
confidence.lat_lng: OpenStreetMap Nominatim geocode of 110 Championship Way.
